name: Anubis

partnerSkill.name: Guardian of the Desert
partnerSkill.description: When fighting together, applies Ground damage to the player's attacks. Sometimes dodges attacks with a high speed sidestep while in a battle.

paldeckEntry: Once seen as a symbol of nobility, and an idol for those who shunned wealth and power. Yet over time, this Pal became a token of death.

name: Arsox

partnerSkill.name: Warm Body
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Keeps the rider warm in cold environments.

paldeckEntry:
In ancient times, carnivorous Pals pursued them relentlessly.
The Arsox's irrational rage transformed into a raging inferno, which has been passed on to this day.

name: Astegon

partnerSkill.name: Black Ankylosaur
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden a flying mount. Increases damage dealt to ore while mounted.

paldeckEntry: A savage beast born of the abyss. Thou shall not stand before the beast. Thou shall not heed the beast.

name: Azurmane

partnerSkill.name: Plasma Dash
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden.
Also allows dashing in the air and moving at high speed.

paldeckEntry:
Like Univolt, it was once believed to be connected to the Thunder God.
As faith in Univolt waned, Azurmane was deemed the God's true envoy.
Even so, time reduced both to the same lowly status of ordinary workhorses.

name: Azurobe

partnerSkill.name: Waterwing Dance
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden to travel on water. Applies Water damage to the player's attacks while mounted.

paldeckEntry: This Pal's white ribbon turns black if doused with impure water. Given its usefulness in detecting poison, this Pal was once overhunted. This past has left them bitter towards humanity.

name: Azurobe Cryst

partnerSkill.name: Icewing Dance
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden to travel on water.
Changes the player's attack type to Ice while mounted.

paldeckEntry:
This Pal's white ribbon continously absorbs heat from its surroundings, yet its temperature remains curiously unchanged.
This strange ability once made it a target of relentless hunting, leaving it with deep mistrust of humans to this day.

name: Bastigor

partnerSkill.name: Blizzard Crash
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden.
While mounted, delivers crushing blows with a Ice-forged hammer.

paldeckEntry:
The sight of anything round gives it an uncontrollable urge to punch it.
For Bastigor the toughest challenge, after simply living, is making a snowman.

name: Beakon

partnerSkill.name: Thunderous
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Applies Electric damage to the player's attacks while mounted.

paldeckEntry: Some think it is a related species to Ragnahawk, but there is in fact no connection. Using its sharp beak, it descends on its prey in a quick motion that resembles a bolt of lightning.

name: Beegarde

partnerSkill.name: Worker Bee
partnerSkill.description:
Sometimes drops Honey when assigned to Ranch.
While in team, Elizabee's stats will be increased.

paldeckEntry:
A servant that pledges loyalty to Elizabee.
Any that cause harm to the queen are immediately expelled from the hive.
It will gladly give its life to protect its queen.

name: Bellanoir

partnerSkill.name: Nightmare Iris
partnerSkill.description: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Nightmare Ray.

paldeckEntry: Without existing, she quietly gazed upon the world. One day, she was seized with a longing to be seen. With unbridled lust for vengeance against reality, thus was born the Eclipsed Siren.

name: Bellanoir Libero

partnerSkill.name: Nightmare Stare
partnerSkill.description: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Nightmare Bloom.

paldeckEntry: With her desires set loose, she was soon overwhelmed. She longed for a self to gaze upon herself. And the sisters who gazed, resenting reality, were driven into the abyss and, at last, closed their eyes.

name: Blazamut

partnerSkill.name: Magma Kaiser
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Enhances Fire attacks while mounted.

paldeckEntry: Legends say it was born during a volcanic eruption. A strange group even claims that this continent is laid upon the back of a giant Blazamut.

name: Blazamut Ryu

partnerSkill.name: Dragon Kaiser
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden.
Enhances Dragon attacks while mounted.

paldeckEntry:
Long ago, it emerged from the depths of the earth.
With relentless, raging flames showing no mercy, it burned the entire island until nothing remained.
It was known as the Eternal Flame.

name: Blazehowl

partnerSkill.name: Hellflame Lion
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While fighting together, Grass Pals drop more items when defeated.

paldeckEntry: While it prefers raw meat, it always ends up eating well-done meat. This is due to its blistering claws, which it uses as its weapon—it simply doesn't realize its prey gets burned to a crisp.

name: Blazehowl Noct

partnerSkill.name: Darkflame Lion
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden.
While fighting together, Neutral Pals drop more items when defeated.

paldeckEntry: While it prefers raw meat, it always ends up eating tainted meat. This is due to its dark claws, which it uses as its weapon—it simply doesn't realize its prey got cursed.

name: Boltmane
paldeckEntry: The more it moves, the more it heats up and the hair tips increasingly glow brighter. At its peak, it becomes so dazzling that you risk blindness if you stare at it directly.

name: Braloha

partnerSkill.name: Balmy Weather
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden.
While at base, shortens the time it takes Pals assigned to to produce eggs.
(This effect does not stack.)

paldeckEntry:
Its breath carries a miraculous, pollen-like substance that pollinates any plant it touches.
For plant-based Pals, being near it can be a bit -- complicated.

name: Bristla

partnerSkill.name: Princess Gaze
partnerSkill.description: While in team, increases attack power of Grass Pals.

paldeckEntry: This prickly Pal's thorns are highly poisonous. It is friendly with Cinnamoth and only smiles when Cinnamoth is drinking its nectar.

name: Broncherry

partnerSkill.name: Overaffectionate
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in team, Broncherry helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

paldeckEntry:
Its scent drastically changes before and after pairing.
It exudes a pleasing aroma after finding a partner, which is called the "fragrance of first love."

name: Broncherry Aqua

partnerSkill.name: Overaffectionate
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in team, Broncherry helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

paldeckEntry: Its scent drastically changes before and after pairing. It exudes a pleasing aroma before finding a partner, which is called the "perfume of purity."

name: Bushi

partnerSkill.name: Brandish Blade
partnerSkill.description: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Iaigiri.

paldeckEntry: Its body becomes a blade upon death, to be taken up by the next generation. If someone other than a Bushi wields this blade, the soul within torments them until they are driven mad.

name: Bushi Noct

partnerSkill.name: Brandish Blade
partnerSkill.description: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Iagiri.

paldeckEntry:
Its body becomes a blade upon death, to be taken by the next generation.
If the Bushi who inherits it has a weak heart, the voice of the dead will drive it mad.
The madness turns it into Bushi Noct that endlessly wanders.

name: Caprity

partnerSkill.name: Berry Picker
partnerSkill.description: Sometimes drops Red Berries from its back when assigned to Ranch.

paldeckEntry: The shrub on this pal's back produces berries as long as it is properly fed. It offers these berries to potential mates, and if the flavor is to their liking, romance blossoms.

name: Caprity Noct

partnerSkill.name: Venom Picker
partnerSkill.description: Sometimes drops Venom Gland from its back when assigned to Ranch.

paldeckEntry:
The berries that grow on its back change flavor according to its emotions.
The harsher the environment it grows in, the sweeter the berries become.
This is why most Caprity Noct raised in captivity have never known love.

name: Cattiva

partnerSkill.name: Cat Helper
partnerSkill.description: While in team, Cattiva helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

paldeckEntry: At a glance it appears full of confidence, but it is in fact weak and cowardly. Being toyed with by a Cattiva is in many ways the greatest of disgraces.

name: Cawgnito

partnerSkill.name: Telepeck
partnerSkill.description: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Phantom Peck.

paldeckEntry: Long ago it freely soared the skies. After losing a contest with Galeclaw, it abandoned the skies and now lives a quiet nocturnal life.

name: Celaray

partnerSkill.name: Zephyr Glider
partnerSkill.description:
While in team, can be summoned and used instead of a glider.
Allows you to move quickly for long periods of time while gliding with this Pal.

paldeckEntry: Riding the wind, this Pal travels where it pleases. Should it find a partner along the way, the encounter will mark its journey's end.

name: Celaray Lux

partnerSkill.name: Jolt Glider
partnerSkill.description:
While in team, modifies the performance of the equipped glider.
Increases speed while gliding for an extended time.

paldeckEntry:
Its flashy pattern help it attract a partner.
But after a long history of electrocution incidents involving Celaray Lux, yellow-and-black stripes are now seen across the island as a sign of danger.

name: Celesdir

partnerSkill.name: Blessing of Purification
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden.
Increases the player's auto recovery speed while mounted.

paldeckEntry:
Ancient texts refer to it as the "Beast of Salvation."
The light emitted by Celesdir purifies everything, literally causing things to vanish from existence without leaving a trace.

name: Chikipi

partnerSkill.name: Egg Layer
partnerSkill.description: Sometimes lays an Egg when assigned to Ranch.

paldeckEntry: Extremely weak and far too delicious. It is one of the weakest Pals alongside Lamball. No matter how many are hunted, they just keep appearing.

name: Chillet

partnerSkill.name: Wriggling Weasel
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden.
Applies Dragon damage to the player's attacks while mounted.

paldeckEntry:
It can curl up its body and roll around at extremely high speeds.
Long ago, people would tie bags of milk to domesticated Chillet as they grazed to produce butter using this spinning force.

name: Chillet Ignis

partnerSkill.name: Crackling Weasel
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden.
Applies Fire damage to the player's attacks while mounted.

paldeckEntry:
When curled up it spins so fast that sparks fly.
Sparks also fly when it feels excited.
If you stroke it too much, this pal will get fired up, literally!

name: Cinnamoth

partnerSkill.name: Mysterious Scales
partnerSkill.description: When activated, attacks target enemy with Poison Fog.

paldeckEntry:
Sniffing its scales produces a feeling of unparalleled euphoria.
There was some effort to further regulate this byproduct, but the Free Pal Alliance have vehemently opposed these measures, putting a stop to them.

name: Cremis

partnerSkill.name: Fluffy Wool
partnerSkill.description: While in team, increases attack power of Neutral Pals. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

paldeckEntry: Compared to Lamball, it has finer wool and a temperament more suited for domestication. However, it has historically been kept as a pet. Cuteness is considered a virtue.

name: Croajiro

partnerSkill.name: Leap Stance
partnerSkill.description:
When activated, Croajiro swells its abdomen and channels its loyalty to build up energy.
Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air.

paldeckEntry: Those who disgrace the honor of the herd are forced to take their own life. By piercing their inflated vocal sac with a tree branch, they are blown away into the atmosphere and return to the afterlife.

name: Croajiro Noct

partnerSkill.name: Shadow Stance
partnerSkill.description:
When activated, Croajiro Noct swells its abodmen and channel its loyalty to build up energy.
Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air.
While in team, increases the power of Dark Pals.

paldeckEntry:
The Croajiro who have forsaken their honor gather and form a splinter group.
They will use any underhanded means to take down their chosen prey.
If you encounter a pack of Croajiro Noct in the dead of the night, it's your life that's on the line.

name: Cryolinx

partnerSkill.name: Dragon Hunter
partnerSkill.description: While fighting together, Dragon Pals drop more items when defeated.

paldeckEntry: It can easily climb steep mountains with its hard claws. However, its short legs make it difficult to descend, often leaving it stranded in high places.

name: Cryolinx Terra

partnerSkill.name: Electro Hunter
partnerSkill.description: While fighting together, Electric Pals drop more items when defeated.

paldeckEntry:
It can easily carry many items with its large hands.
However, its short legs slow its pace, often leaving it overtaken by nightfall.

name: Daedream

partnerSkill.name: Dream Chaser
partnerSkill.description: While in team, appears near the player. Follows up player attacks with magic bullets.

paldeckEntry: It puts those it is interested in to sleep and shows them an endless stream of happy dreams. Those who fall under its spell are never to wake until death takes them.

name: Dark Mutant
paldeckEntry: Some say a beam from a Dark Mutant that has perfected its technique can tear holes into other dimensions. It's even believed that certain species of pals were born from such phenomena.

name: Dazemu

partnerSkill.name: Sand Spirit
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden.
Runs faster over sand.

paldeckEntry:
Take one step forward and forget your doubts.
Take two steps forward and forget your worries.
Take three steps forward and forget your fears.
Face any enemy.

name: Dazzi

partnerSkill.name: Lady of Lightning
partnerSkill.description: While in team, appears near the player. Follows up player attacks with lightning bolts.

paldeckEntry:
Often kind to lonely pals.
However, the moment a Pal mistakes this for actual companionship, it seizes the opportunity to blast them with a thunderbolt.

name: Dazzi Noct

partnerSkill.name: Lady of Dark Lightning
partnerSkill.description:
While in team, appears near the player.
Follows up player attacks with dark lightning bolts.

paldeckEntry:
Often kind to lonely Pals, it plots to lure them into dropping their guard before striking them down.
Yet, Unable to find the right moment, it ends up making friends with them instead.

name: Depresso

partnerSkill.name: Caffeine Inoculation
partnerSkill.description: When activated, Depresso drinks a massive amount of energy drinks, causing its movement speed to increase.

paldeckEntry: It has few friends because of the perpetually grouchy look on its face, but it is in fact kindhearted. Some have seen it feeding Vixy who have strayed from their pack.

name: Digtoise

partnerSkill.name: Drill Crusher
partnerSkill.description: When activated, performs Shell Spin, follows the player while spinning, and mines ores efficiently.

paldeckEntry: A walking contradiction, possessing the strongest shell and the only drill capable of piercing it. "Digtoise's Fable" is a popular children's tale.

name: Dinossom

partnerSkill.name: Fragrant Dragon
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden.
Enhances Grass attacks while mounted.

paldeckEntry: A Pal who, once angered, cannot be pacified. It rages on and on like an inferno. The phrase "step on a Dinossom's tail" has come to mean enraging someone.

name: Dinossom Lux

partnerSkill.name: Thunder Dragon
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Enhances Electric attacks while mounted.

paldeckEntry: Though struck by lightning, it lives on. The phrase "struck by a Dinossom Lux's bolt" has come to mean narrowly escaping death.

name: Direhowl

partnerSkill.name: Direhowl Rider
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden.
Moves slightly faster than most mounts.

paldeckEntry: Long ago Direhowl would hunt alongside humans but over the years this bond faded.

name: Dogen

partnerSkill.name: Homeward Prayer
partnerSkill.description:
When activated, moves to the closest base.
Cannot be used within dungeons, etc.

paldeckEntry:
Striving for a state of selflessness, it meditates endlessly.
After confronting its wordly desires, it eats a meal and reflects.
It ate too much today.

name: Dragostrophe
paldeckEntry: A silent beast born of the abyss. Thou shall not stand before the beast. Thou shall not heed the beast.

name: Dumud

partnerSkill.name: Soil Improver
partnerSkill.description: While in team, increases attack power of Ground Pals.

paldeckEntry:
When too relaxed, its reaction time drastically declines.
Even if it were sliced from head to tail, it probably wouldn't even realize that it should be dead until the next morning.

name: Dumud Gild

partnerSkill.name: Golden Harvest
partnerSkill.description:
While in team, increases attack power of Ground Pals.
Sometimes, drop High Quality Pal Oil when assigned to Ranch with a small chance to drop Gold Coin.

paldeckEntry:
Its body reflects light with astounding clarity.
Even more shocking, its reflexes are somehow slower than Dumud.

name: Eikthyrdeer

partnerSkill.name: Guardian of the Forest
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden.
Can perform a double jump while mounted.
Increases efficiency of cutting trees.

paldeckEntry: The one who possesses the most impressive antlers becomes the leader of the herd. If their antlers are broken, they become depressed and leave the herd never to be seen again.

name: Eikthyrdeer Terra

partnerSkill.name: Guardian of the Golden Forest
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted. Increases efficiency of cutting trees.

paldeckEntry: The individual with the hardest horns becomes the leader. Once the horns are lost, so too is the leadership status. It leaves the herd amidst farewell glances and quietly returns to the earth.

name: Elizabee

partnerSkill.name: Queen Bee Command
partnerSkill.description: While fighting together, stats will increase the more Beegarde are in your team.

paldeckEntry:
A chosen queen to rule over Beegardes.
There is a never ending stream of servants willing to work themselves to death for the pleasure of serving their queen.

name: Elphidran

partnerSkill.name: Amicable Holy Dragon
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden as a flying mount.
 While fighting together, Dark Pals drop more items when defeated.

paldeckEntry: It possesses a demeanor as pure as its appearance suggests. Perhaps because of this, it is sometimes unable to discern good from evil, often allowing wrongdoers to take advantage of it.

name: Elphidran Aqua

partnerSkill.name: Amicable Water Dragon
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden as a flying mount.
While fighting together, Fire Pals drop more items when defeated.

paldeckEntry: It possesses a demeanor as pure as its appearance suggests. Perhaps because of this, it harbors no ill will in any of its actions and is indifferent even after killing someone.

name: Faleris

partnerSkill.name: Scorching Predator
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While fighting together, Ice Pals drop more items when defeated.

paldeckEntry: When it finds its prey it unleashes a whirlwind of flames, burning the entire area to ash. Faleris breath is known for its pleasing scent.

name: Faleris Aqua

partnerSkill.name: Tidal Predator
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden as a flying mount.
While fighting together, Fire Pals drop more items when defeated.

paldeckEntry:
When it finds its prey, it unleashes a mighty torrent, sweeping the entire area.
More often than not, the prey gets swept away in the chaos, leaving one to wonder whether this truly count as hunting.

name: Felbat

partnerSkill.name: Life Steal
partnerSkill.description: While fighting together, grants the player and Felbat the life steal effect which absorbs some of the received damage and restores HP.

paldeckEntry: Attacking from the shadows, this Pal traps its prey within its cloak-like wings. It's probably best not to know what happens within them, or why the inside of its wings are stained red.

name: Fenglope

partnerSkill.name: Wind and Clouds
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted.

paldeckEntry: In ancient times, it was a familiar subject for painting because of its beautiful and majestic appearance. Fenglope is an endangered species, the Fenglope whose beautiful fur and horns are much sought after by poachers!

name: Fenglope Lux

partnerSkill.name: Stormcloud
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden.
Can double jump while mounted.
While fighting together, Water Pals drop more items when defeated.

paldeckEntry:
In ages past, it was believed that drawing a picture of Fenglope Lux would result in being struck down by lightning.
As time passes, artworks depicting Fenglope Lux became revered as charms to ward off lightning, making them a common presence.

name: Finsider

partnerSkill.name: Echo Chamber
partnerSkill.description: While in team, Finsider helps carry supplies, decreasing the weight of weapons in the player's inventory.

paldeckEntry:
It looks like something peeking out from inside a costume, but even if you reach inside, there's nothing there.
In fact, you can keep reaching deeper and deeper.
Perhaps the universe itself lies within.

name: Finsider Ignis

partnerSkill.name: Ember Chamber
partnerSkill.description:
While in team, Finsider Ignis helps carry supplies, decreasing the weight of weapons in the player's inventory.
Also increases attack power of Fire Pals.

paldeckEntry:
Even if you reach into its mouth, there's nothing inside-it just keeps going.
Thinking it might be an interdimensional space, one researcher tried climbing in like a sleeping bag.
But when the gag reflex kicked in, they realized... it's defintely part of the creature's body.

name: Flambelle

partnerSkill.name: Magma Tears
partnerSkill.description: Sometimes produces Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.

paldeckEntry: When it starts crying, this Pal produces magma in place of tears. The magma that pours out is absorbed back into its body, causing it to get hotter and hotter. The more it cries, the stronger it becomes.

name: Flopie

partnerSkill.name: Helper Bunny
partnerSkill.description: While in team, appears nearby the player. Automatically picks up nearby items.

paldeckEntry: It prefers places that have an abundance of vegetation, but hay fever has apparently become a problem for Flopie as of late.

name: Foxcicle

partnerSkill.name: Aurora Guide
partnerSkill.description: While in a team, increases attack power of Ice pals.

paldeckEntry: On nights when the aurora is visible, it looks up towards the sky and begins to howl a beautiful song. This does, however, leave it vulnerable to attacks from enemies.

name: Foxparks

partnerSkill.name: Huggy Fire
partnerSkill.description: When activated, equips to the player and transforms into a flamethrower.

paldeckEntry: It is unskilled at controlling fire from the moment it is born and tends to choke on the flames it breathes unintentionally. Foxparks sneezes are one of the leading causes of forest fires.

name: Foxparks Cryst

partnerSkill.name: Huggy Frost
partnerSkill.description: When activated, equips to the player and attacks using frigid air.

paldeckEntry: It is unskilled at controlling cold air from the moment it is born and tends to choke on the frost it breathes unintentionally. When Foxparks Cryst catches a cold, its nasal discharge freezes, making it difficult to breathe and causing it to panic.

name: Frostallion

partnerSkill.name: Ice Steed
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Changes the player's attack type to Ice and enhances Ice attacks while mounted.

paldeckEntry: Guardian deity of Palpagos Island, known as the Winter Caller. In the past, when a calamity struck the land, it soared into the sky and sealed away the threat by casting the island into an eternal winter.

name: Frostallion Noct

partnerSkill.name: Black Steed
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Changes the player's attack type to Dark and enhances Dark attacks while mounted.

paldeckEntry: Guardian deity of Palpagos Island known as the Night Caller. In the past, when a calamity struck the land, it soared into the sky and sealed away the threat by casting the island into eternal darkness.

name: Frostplume

partnerSkill.name: Peacock Pounce
partnerSkill.description: While fighting together, Frostplume's icy aura sharpens your focus, improving reload speed.

paldeckEntry:
So precise is its sense of time that it awakens at the exact same hour every morning.
According to Palpagos lore, a day is divided into 24 parts because when Frostplume spreads its feathers wide, it reveals a pattern with 24 distinct spaces.

name: Fuack

partnerSkill.name: Surfing Slam
partnerSkill.description: When activated, Fuack body surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.

paldeckEntry: Using its own body water, this Pal can create waves anywhere. It body surfs when in a hurry, but the resulting speed often ends in a fatal collision.

name: Fuack Ignis

partnerSkill.name: Fire Tackle
partnerSkill.description: When activated, Fuack Ignis surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.

paldeckEntry:
With a belly built for friction, this pal sparks flames as it body surfs.
But when it gets carried away, it often ends up a rolling fireball.

name: Fuddler

partnerSkill.name: Ore Detector
partnerSkill.description: When activated, generates subtle vibrations to detect nearby ore.

paldeckEntry: Its large claws boast of diamond-like hardness. However, sharpening these claws consumes most of its energy, leading it to sometimes spending entire days doing nothing else.

name: Galeclaw

partnerSkill.name: Galeclaw Rider
partnerSkill.description: While in team, can be summoned and used instead of a glider. Allows you to fire a gun while gliding with this Pal.

paldeckEntry:
A Pal that can easily take flight even while grasping a human.
It is, however, prone to letting go when tired, which has led to the sudden demise of more than a few souls.

name: Ghangler

partnerSkill.name: Master Night Angler
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden to travel quickly across water.
While fighting together, the time it takes for Pals to bite during night fishing is reduced.

paldeckEntry:
With its shinining lure, it illuminates the darkness.
The wandering Pals drawn by the light stand no chance of escape once spotted by Ghangler.
No matter how far, it will keep guiding them until they get home safe and sound.

name: Ghangler Ignis

partnerSkill.name: Flame Lantern
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden to travel quickly across water.
While fighting together, the time it takes for Pals to bite during night fishing is reduced.

paldeckEntry:
Its blazing lure doubles as a grill for roasting prey.
Drawn in by the delicious aroma, Pals have no hope of escape once Ghangler Ignis sets its sights on them.
In the end, they're treated to a hearty meal -- until everyone's full.

name: Gildane

partnerSkill.name: Sandstorm's Blessing
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden.
Applies Ground damage to player's attack while mounted.

paldeckEntry:
During the golden age of alchemy on the island, its ever-glowing golden fur was highly prized as a catalyst for transmuting gold.
In time, a remarkable revelation was made:
the same golden hue could be achieved simply by processing its mane.

name: Gloopie

partnerSkill.name: Sticky Princess
partnerSkill.description: While fighting together, the capture gauge decreases more slowly in the fishing minigame when the capture bars are not overlapping.

paldeckEntry:
Be sure to check your plans for the next week before falling asleep with this pal.
Its suction cups leave marks that look suspciously like hickeys.
One sleepy cuddle session could lead to some truly awkward misunderstandings.

name: Gobfin

partnerSkill.name: Angry Shark
partnerSkill.description: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Aqua Gun. While in team, increases player's attack power.

paldeckEntry:
Long ago, it was a large and powerful aquatic Pal.
As food became scarce it evolved to live on land.
Since walking requires much energy, it gradually became smaller and is now a small and puny Pal.

name: Gobfin Ignis

partnerSkill.name: Angry Shark
partnerSkill.description: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Spirit Fire. While in team, increases player's attack power.

paldeckEntry: Once upon a time, it was a giant and powerful aquatic Pal. However, with the dwindling availability of food, it ventured onto land. As a consequence of burning many calories to walk, it astonishingly awakened its power to control fire!

name: Gorirat

partnerSkill.name: Full-power Gorilla Mode
partnerSkill.description: When activated, unleashes a primal fury that increases Gorirat's attack power.

paldeckEntry: It beats the ground rhythmically to communicate with its comrades. The meaning of each rhythm differs by troop, but the distinction between them is still largely unknown.

name: Gorirat Terra

partnerSkill.name: Full-power Gorilla Mode
partnerSkill.description: When activated, unleashes a primal fury that increases Gorirat Terra's attack power.

paldeckEntry:
It communicates with its friends through rhythmic tapping on the ground.
Stronger than Gorirat. 
If every Gorirat Terra hit the ground at the same time, the island would sink in 1 second.

name: Green slime

partnerSkill.name: Slime Body
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Can jump high into the air while mounted.

paldeckEntry:
[Tides of Terraria] 
 A monster from another world, now tameable in this realm.

name: Grintale

partnerSkill.name: Plump Body
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Enhances Neutral attacks while mounted.

paldeckEntry:
Grintale's eyes light up the moment anyone enters its territory.
This is no figure of speech- its eyes literally light up.

name: Grizzbolt

partnerSkill.name: Yellow Tank
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a minigun while mounted.

paldeckEntry: With a friendly smile and a hardy physique, it is docile towards one it recognizes as a partner. For reasons unexplained, its personality undergoes a drastic change when wielding a minigun.

name: Gumoss

partnerSkill.name: Logging Assistance
partnerSkill.description: While in team, improves efficiency of cutting trees.

paldeckEntry: A strange Pal with a body resembling tree sap. It gradually loses strength if it has nothing to cover its body with, eventually rotting away.

name: Hangyu

partnerSkill.name: Flying Trapeze
partnerSkill.description: While in team, can be summoned and used instead of a glider. Carries the player up high while gliding.

paldeckEntry:
Its gigantic arms can rip apart even iron.
As a particularly cruel form of execution, serious criminals would be strung up in a public square, and a Hangyu would rip off the skin from their bones.

name: Hangyu Cryst

partnerSkill.name: Winter Trapeze
partnerSkill.description: While in team, can be summoned and used instead of a glider. Carries the player up high while gliding.

paldeckEntry: Its gigantic arms can tear through blocks of ice. There were times when great sinners were tied in the town square and had their hair torn out by as a brutal form of public humiliation.

name: Hartalis

partnerSkill.name: Sacred Barrier
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden.
While mounted, generates a barrier that blocks all attacks.
Can triple jump while mounted.

paldeckEntry:
The silence is unsettling, yet strangely soothing.
No one else remains. All have been delivered.
O King of Salvation, carry me too into eternal stillness.
-The ancient text cuts off here.

name: Helzephyr

partnerSkill.name: Wings of Death
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Applies Dark damage to the player's attacks while mounted.

paldeckEntry: It calls forth lightning from the depths of hell. One who dies from Helzephyr's inferno is sure to be sent to the underworld.

name: Helzephyr Lux

partnerSkill.name: Wings of Thunder
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Applies Electric damage to the player's attacks while mounted.

paldeckEntry:
It calls forth lightning from the depths of hell.
While considered a subspecies of Helzephyr, there's a theory that suggests Helzephyr Lux, struck by lightning from hell, will transform into Helzephyr.

name: Herbil

partnerSkill.name: Herbil Pulse
partnerSkill.description: While in team, Herbil uses its healing powers to revive the player when incapacited.

paldeckEntry:
When in doubt, punch it till it works - that's Herbil's approach to fixing things.
With strength perfectly tuned for humans, sometimes just one punch is enough to restart a stopped heart.

name: Hoocrates

partnerSkill.name: Dark Knowledge
partnerSkill.description: While in team, increases attack power of Dark Pals.

paldeckEntry: Often lost in thought, it sometimes finds it difficult to sleep. "I think, therefore I am."'

name: Icelyn

partnerSkill.name: Witch's Icy Veil
partnerSkill.description: While fighting together, changes the player's attack type to Ice.

paldeckEntry:
Though its body melts in the heat, it just can't resist sunbathing.
Though its body melts in the warmth, it likes hot springs too much.
If it's going to melt anyway, it hopes it'll be in a steaming outdoor bath under a clear blue sky.

name: Incineram

partnerSkill.name: Flameclaw Hunter
partnerSkill.description: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Hellfire Claw.

paldeckEntry:
In the dark of night, this Pal snatches prey to bring back to its territory.
What happens to those poor souls afterwards isn't too hard to imagine.

name: Incineram Noct

partnerSkill.name: Darkclaw Hunter
partnerSkill.description: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Hellfire Claw.

paldeckEntry: It specifically targets baby pals, taking them back to its territory. One can only imagine the profound despair of the parent Pal, whose child has been taken away.

name: Jelliette

partnerSkill.name: Jelliette Drop
partnerSkill.description:
While in team, increases drops from fishing.
While Jelliette and Jelliroy are in base, Jelliette's watering speed is increased.

paldeckEntry:
A pal that closely resembles Jellroy
It is very social, so when overlap, it asks its good friend Jellroy to go in its place.
As thanks, one date.

name: Jellroy

partnerSkill.name: Jellroy Drop
partnerSkill.description:
While in team, increases items obtained from salvage.
While Jelliette and Jellroy are in your base, Jellroy's watering speed is increased.

paldeckEntry:
A pal that closely resembles Jelliette.
It sometimes appears as a substitute when Jelliette is unavailable.
Its acting is so flawless that noone ever notices the switch.

name: Jetragon

partnerSkill.name: Aerial Missile
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted.

paldeckEntry:
Looks over the island of Palpagos from the ends of the sky.
When the calamity awakens again, splitting the earth and setting the heavens on fire, he will destroy it with a glare of complete obliteration.

name: Jolthog

partnerSkill.name: Jolt Bomb
partnerSkill.description: When activated, equips Jolthog to the player's hand. When thrown at an enemy, causes an electrical explosion upon impact.

paldeckEntry: Releases the electricity stored in it's body when under attack, producing a shock that can be over 10 million volts. If thrown, it can even be more lethal than any conventional heavy weaponry.

name: Jolthog Cryst

partnerSkill.name: Cold Bomb
partnerSkill.description: When activated, equips Jolthog Cryst to the player's hand. When thrown at an enemy, causes an icy explosion upon impact.

paldeckEntry: It releases cold air stored in its body when under attack. The frigid blast it radiates is cold enough to freeze the surrounding air and easily pierces through any attacker's body.

name: Jormuntide

partnerSkill.name: Stormbringer Sea Dragon
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, prevents stamina depletion while moving over water.

paldeckEntry: Legends says the Jormuntide was once a wise man, who after being wrongly convicted and cast into a whirlpool, returned as this Pal to destroy those who wronged him.

name: Jormuntide Ignis

partnerSkill.name: Stormbringer Lava Dragon
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Enhances Fire attacks while mounted.

paldeckEntry: Legend says the Jormuntide Ignis was once a warrior who, after being wrongly convicted and cast into a volcano, returned as this Pal to destroy those who wronged him.

name: Katress

partnerSkill.name: Grimoire Collector
partnerSkill.description: While fighting together, Neutral Pals drop more items when defeated.

paldeckEntry: With the power of shadows it produces arcane phenomena. It prefers to eat food raw and is particularly hostile towards Wixen.

name: Katress Ignis

partnerSkill.name: Field Guide
partnerSkill.description: While fighting together, Grass Pals drop more items when defeated.

paldeckEntry:
Due to its upbringing, it no longer cares whether its food is raw enough.
This Pal stopped worrying about those details, and just prefers its food to be as spicy as possible.
Not on good terms with Wixen Noct.

name: Kelpsea

partnerSkill.name: Aqua Spout
partnerSkill.description: While in team, increases attack power of Water Pals. Sometimes drops Pal Fluids when assigned to Ranch.

paldeckEntry: Its personality changes depending on the quality of the water it was born into. Kelpsea born into polluted waters are generally ill-tempered and quickly become delinquents.

name: Kelpsea Ignis

partnerSkill.name: Lava Spout
partnerSkill.description: While in team, increases attack power of Fire Pals. Sometimes drops Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.

paldeckEntry: Their personalities change depending on the temperature of the water where they were born. Kelpsea born in warm waters generally have a passionate, motivated personality.

name: Kikit

partnerSkill.name: Rollin' Full Oil
partnerSkill.description: While in team, Kikit helps carry supplies, decreasing the weight of crude oil in the player's inventory.

paldeckEntry:
A decade ago, Kikit soccer was popular.
However, it quickly fell out of favor due to fierce opposition from the Free Pal Alliance.
Nevertheless, the Kikits themselves didn't mind because it helped shed their old carapace.

name: Killamari

partnerSkill.name: Fried Squid
partnerSkill.description:
While in team, can be summoned and used instead of a glider.
Can float for long periods of time while gliding.

paldeckEntry: It wraps itself around an enemy's head, sucking out their insides. Pal mummies are occasionally found, but these are in fact Killamari victims.

name: Killamari Primo

partnerSkill.name: Fried Killamari
partnerSkill.description: While in team, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables gentle floating while gliding for an extended time.

paldeckEntry:
It sinks its fangs into the enemy's neck, draining every last drop of blood.
When two Killamari Primos latch onto each other, they become locked in a relentless struggle - each trying to suck the other dry until one withers away.

name: Kingpaca

partnerSkill.name: King of Muscles
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in team, Kingpaca helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

paldeckEntry:
Melpaca serve this Pal.
Contests between Kingpaca offer up their vassals as a wager. Those seen alone are losers of such contests.

name: Kingpaca Cryst

partnerSkill.name: King of Muscles
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in team, Kingpaca helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

paldeckEntry: With a heart of ice, this Pal is terrible at expressing its emotions. A solitary individual is pitiable, seen as too clumsy in the eyes of Melpaca.

name: Kitsun

partnerSkill.name: Clear Mind
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Unaffected by the cold or heat while riding this Pal.

paldeckEntry: Despite its appearance, Kitsun is extremely sensitive and will flee into a cave when spooked. Long ago, it was considered an ill omen if one were found nearby.

name: Kitsun Noct

partnerSkill.name: Fogged Mind
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden.
Applies Dark damage to the player's attacks while mounted.

paldeckEntry:
Despite its appearance, Kitsun Noct is extremely sensitive and will flee into a cave when spooked.
It has become quite gloomy from being a shut-in for too long.

name: Knocklem

partnerSkill.name: Steel Guardian Mode
partnerSkill.description: When activated, a steel resolve increases Knocklem's attack and defense.

paldeckEntry:
Can be disassembled into 215 parts, and even if the parts are scattered, it will reassemble itself and start moving again.
If parts from different individuals are mixed it will malfunction due to mistaken identity.

name: Lamball

partnerSkill.name: Fluffy Shield
partnerSkill.description:
When activated, equips to the player and becomes a shield.
Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

paldeckEntry: A walk up a hill tends to end with this Pal tumbling back down. This causes it to become dizzy and unable to move, making it easy to capture and kill. As a result, this Pal has tumbled down to the very bottom of the food chain itself.

name: Leezpunk

partnerSkill.name: Sixth Sense
partnerSkill.description: When activated, utilizes its sixth sense to detect nearby dungeons.

paldeckEntry: A Pal that always takes great care to maintain a stylish stance. Always on the hunt for the coolest poses, if given a mirror it will spend all day posing in front of it.

name: Leezpunk Ignis

partnerSkill.name: Sixth Sense
partnerSkill.description: When activated, utilizes its sixth sense to detect nearby dungeons.

paldeckEntry:
A Pal that has an unusual obsession with their standing posture.
Always in search of the hottest pose, this Pal's owner is constantly presented with fervent stances.

name: Lifmunk

partnerSkill.name: Lifmunk Recoil
partnerSkill.description: When activated, leaps on top of the player's head and uses a submachine gun to follow up the players attacks.

paldeckEntry: Intelligent as a five to seven-year-old human child. It makes a wonderful partner, but there have been more than a few cases where they've killed their master after learning to use weapons.

name: Loupmoon

partnerSkill.name: Claws Glistening in the Dark
partnerSkill.description: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Jumping Claw.

paldeckEntry: The horns on its head grow under the moonlight. It doesn't hate the sun, but its horns itch when sunlight hits them.

name: Loupmoon Cryst

partnerSkill.name: Frozen Gleam Strike
partnerSkill.description: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Snow Claw.

paldeckEntry:
The horns on its head are made of a mysterious ice that never melts.
Shaved ice made by breaking off a horn is truly exquisite, but both the one who tries it and Loupmoon Cryst end up with a headache.

name: Lovander

partnerSkill.name: Heart Drain
partnerSkill.description: While fighting together, grants the player and Lovander the life steal effect which absorbs some of the received damage and restores HP.

paldeckEntry: Seeking a night of love, it is always chasing someone around. At first, it only showed interest in other Pals, but in recent years even humans have become the target of its debauchery.

name: Lullu

partnerSkill.name: Floral Boost
partnerSkill.description: While at a base, Lullu fills the farm with good spirits, increasing the growth rate of the crops.

paldeckEntry:
In early spring, pollen floats on the wind throughout the island.
Flopie's hay fever is Lullu's fault.

name: Lunaris

partnerSkill.name: Antigravity
partnerSkill.description: While in team, Lunaris manipulates gravity, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

paldeckEntry: It can control those who carelessly stare into its eyes. Those seen with a Lunaris are in its mind, simply under its control.

name: Lyleen

partnerSkill.name: Harvest Goddess
partnerSkill.description: When activated, the queen's soothing graces greatly restore the player's HP.

paldeckEntry:
A docile Pal full of love.
It watches over small Pals who have lost their parents. It uses a full-power Solar Blast to discipline naughty Pals.

name: Lyleen Noct

partnerSkill.name: Goddess of the Tranquil Light
partnerSkill.description: When activated, the queen's soothing graces greatly restore the player's HP.

paldeckEntry: An elegant Pal full of grace. It admonishes any who are disrespectful with a painful slap. Some Pals actively seek out this punishment.

name: Mammorest

partnerSkill.name: Gaia Crusher
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Improves efficiency of cutting trees and mining ores while mounted.

paldeckEntry: The vegetation on its back varies between individuals. There is a long history of appreciating this veritable garden of a Pal, and there are even Mammorest pruning specialists.

name: Mammorest Cryst

partnerSkill.name: Ice Crusher
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Improves efficiency of cutting trees and mining ores while mounted.

paldeckEntry: The vegetation on its back varies from individual to individual. There was a time when seeds of presumed extinct plants were found still frozen on the back of a Mammorest Cryst.

name: Maraith

partnerSkill.name: Messenger of Death
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden.
Applies Dark damage to the player's attacks while mounted.

paldeckEntry: It relishes the peculiar scent living things give off when they are near death. If a Maraith has taken a liking to you, it is safe to assume that is why.

name: Mau

partnerSkill.name: Gold Digger
partnerSkill.description: Sometimes digs up Gold Coin when assigned to Ranch.

paldeckEntry: Its hard tail does not deteriorate even when cut off. Some believed these severed tails to be good luck, but for the innumerable Mau who were poached as a result, they were anything but.

name: Mau Cryst

partnerSkill.name: Gold Digger
partnerSkill.description: Sometimes digs up Gold Coin when assigned to Ranch.

paldeckEntry: Its crystalline tail is beautiful, but shatters when this Pal dies. Some believe it is good luck to raise one, so Mau Cryst in captivity are treated with great care.

name: Melpaca

partnerSkill.name: Pacapaca Wool
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden.
Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

paldeckEntry: Don't be fooled by its fluffy appearance. A hypersonic kick from one of its long legs may send you flying to the other side of the world.

name: Menasting

partnerSkill.name: Steel Scorpion
partnerSkill.description: When fighting together, increases the player's defense and Electric Pals drop more items when defeated.

paldeckEntry: Being made of pure energy, its insides are completely hollow. This Pal crams still-living prey into its hollow body, where it absorbs them. Hellish screams of pain can often be heard coming from inside this Pal.

name: Menasting Terra

partnerSkill.name: Steel Scorpion
partnerSkill.description: When fighting together, increases the player's defense and Electric Pals drop more items when defeated.

paldeckEntry:
The main body is an entity made of energy, with nothing inside.
It stuffs earth and minerals into its outer shell, achieving overwhelming mass.
Those who are struck by it can only let out hellish groans.

name: Mimog

partnerSkill.name: Unlock
partnerSkill.description:
When near a treasure chest, Mimog can open the chest without using a key.
The type of treasure chest that can be opened depends on the skill level.

paldeckEntry:
There was once a tradition of handling out an award to the person who met their end in the most foolish way.
The first award was given for "being unaware of Mimog, opening the chest, and being bitten to death."

name: Mossanda

partnerSkill.name: Grenadier Panda
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a grenade launcher while mounted.

paldeckEntry: A Pal so powerful it's hard to believe. In one experiment, this Pal tore through 3,000 sheets of paper at once! It's only by some miracle that this Pal isn't a meat-eater.

name: Mossanda Lux

partnerSkill.name: Plane Partner
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a grenade launcher while mounted.

paldeckEntry: A Pal whose power is truly shocking. By altering the electrical currents in its body, this Pal's been able to overload its own strength. When it comes to sheer power, this Pal may be top of the list.

name: Mozzarina

partnerSkill.name: Milk Maker
partnerSkill.description: Sometimes produces Milk when assigned to ranch.

paldeckEntry: Milk pours from this Pal like water from an open faucet, regardless of its gender. It's truly a mystery of life, although this mystery may be better left unsolved.

name: Munchill

partnerSkill.name: Icy Maw
partnerSkill.description: While in team, Munchill cools ingredients inside its mouth, making the food in your inventory less likely to spoil.

paldeckEntry:
The inside of its mouth stays pleasantly cold, making it a natural fridge when closed.
Its saliva contains enzymes that prevent food from rotting.
Thus, it can serve as a food locker for humans --whether its sanitary or not is another matter entirely.

name: Necromus

partnerSkill.name: Dark Knight of the Abyss
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted.

paldeckEntry:
Once he and Paladius were a single species.
They say it is the manifestation of negative feelings, but the depths of their eyes contain traces of compassion.

name: Neptilius

partnerSkill.name: Sentinel of the Great Sea
partnerSkill.description:
While in team, it follows up your attacks with spear strikes.
Can be ridden to travel quickly across water.
While mounted, it can leap high into the air over water.

paldeckEntry:
After the sealing of the calamity, a champion from Feybreak emerged.
It stares out to sea, awaiting one it deems worthy.
For such encounters are no coincidence-they are fate.

name: Nitemary

partnerSkill.name: Soul Collector
partnerSkill.description: While fighting together, Pals drop more Pal Souls when defeated.

paldeckEntry:
What it carries is its own soul.
When it falls for someone, it forcibly extracts their soul and merges it with its own, yearning to become one.

name: Nitewing

partnerSkill.name: Travel Companion
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount.

paldeckEntry:
It carries newborn Pals to its nest and raises them as a surrogate parent. 
Once the baby Pal has fattened up, it hunts them.

name: Nox

partnerSkill.name: Kuudere
partnerSkill.description: When fighting together, applies Dark damage to the player's attacks.

paldeckEntry: If you find Nox hair in your bedding, you should leave it where it lays and leave immediately. Picking it up is a one-way-ticket to a never ending night.

name: Nyafia

partnerSkill.name: Shot-Nyan Mode
partnerSkill.description:
When activated,
Nyafia will fire a shotgun at nearby enemies for a limited time.

paldeckEntry:
Strongly dislikes anyone catching a glimpse of its concealed eye.
If you insist on trying, it'll burst into tears and ignore you for two weeks.

name: Omascul

partnerSkill.name: Masquerade Dance
partnerSkill.description: While in team, the Pals in the team gain more experience points.

paldeckEntry:
The mask it wears is not its face, they say.
It seems in front, but it's not there, no way.
From shadows deep, it watches night and day.
Glance away, and closer it will stray.

name: Orserk

partnerSkill.name: Ferocious Thunder Dragon
partnerSkill.description: While fighting together, Water Pals drop more items when defeated.

paldeckEntry: It sends electricity into its foes' wounds, roasting them from the inside out. Fights between Orserk end in the blink of an eye.

name: Paladius

partnerSkill.name: Holy Knight of the Firmament
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Can triple jump while mounted.

paldeckEntry:
In the past, she and Necromus were a single species.
They say that they are an existence that has freed themselves from all negative feelings, but the depths of their eyes harbor traces of resentment.

name: Palumba

partnerSkill.name: Samba Step
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden.
Runs faster over grass.

paldeckEntry:
Disrupts enemies' rhythm with a signature dance.
In turf battles, the first to fall in sync with the other's rhythm loses.
Courtship, boredom, battle -- it all comes down to dance!
Now then, what could a dance aimed at a human possible mean?

name: Pengullet

partnerSkill.name: Pengullet Cannon
partnerSkill.description: When activated, the player equips a Rocket Launcher and fires Pengullet as ammunition. Pengullet explodes on contact and is incapacitated.

paldeckEntry: The feathers of this Pal have all but disappeared, but sadly, its desire to fly has remained as strong as ever. Even now, it tries to fly again in any way it can.

name: Pengullet Lux

partnerSkill.name: Pengullet Lux Launcher
partnerSkill.description: When activated, the player equips a Rocket Launcher and fires Pengullet Lux as ammunition. Pengullet Lux explodes on contact and is incapitated.

paldeckEntry:
The feathers of this pal have all but disappeared, and it can no longer fly.
Yet its longing for the sky has turned into jealousy- so it harnessed electricity to strike down those who still soar.

name: Penking

partnerSkill.name: Brave Sailor
partnerSkill.description: When fighting together, Fire Pals drop more items when defeated.

paldeckEntry: Surprisingly, it is unrelated to Pengullet. Ever wanting to be the center of attention, this Pal will strut its stuff for any onlookers.

name: Penking Lux

partnerSkill.name: Unyielding Storm Commander
partnerSkill.description: While fighting together, Water Pals drop more items when defeated.

paldeckEntry:
Its body changed color after gaining electricity to improve underwater hunting.
As a result, it lost the affection of Pengullet-- but strangely enough, it now has a loyal follower: Pengullet Lux.

name: Petallia

partnerSkill.name: Blessing of the Flower Spirit
partnerSkill.description: When activated, uses medicinal flowers to restore the player's HP.

paldeckEntry: A pal that transforms into a massive plant when at the end of its life. Once every ten years, a beautiful flower blooms and a new Petallia is born.

name: Polapup

partnerSkill.name: Rider of the Snowy Mountain
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden.
Can slide quickly down slopes.

paldeckEntry:
Among Polapups, the fastest slider on the snow earns the highest respect.
Sometimes, a too-forceful leap sends one tumbling from the sky -- a common sight during territorial season.
Forecast: clear skies with a chance of flying Polapups.

name: Prixter

partnerSkill.name: Scorpion Sonar
partnerSkill.description: When activated, it can analyze airborne particles and find a dungeon's exit.

paldeckEntry:
It has about 5,000 types of poison.
Some of them are deadly enough to cause instant death, but all of them are too weak to have any effect.

name: Prunelia

partnerSkill.name: Prayer for Abundant Harvest
partnerSkill.description:
While at a base,
Prunelia's prayers bless the crops, increasing their harvest.

paldeckEntry:
Intelligent and graceful in its demeanor, it was frequently employed as an attendant by the island's nobles.
However, when encountered at night, its face looked so eerie that it quickly fell out of favor.

name: Pyrin

partnerSkill.name: Red Hare
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Applies Fire damage to the player's attacks while mounted.

paldeckEntry:
It's entire body has evolved into a highly efficient radiator, gifting it with astounding stamina.
When someone has mounted it, this Pal takes caution not to burn them.

name: Pyrin Noct

partnerSkill.name: Black Hare
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Applies Dark damage to the player's attacks while mounted.

paldeckEntry:
It burns mysterious dark matter as energy and expels the remaining particles from its body.
If someone rides it, they should take care so as not to gallop down the path of darkness.

name: Quivern

partnerSkill.name: Sky Dragon's Affection
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Enhances Dragon attacks while mounted.

paldeckEntry: Sleeping while cuddling a Quivern is said to be a heavenly experience, but there are some who have been crushed and sent to heaven by ones that toss and turn in their sleep.

name: Quivern Botan

partnerSkill.name: Grass Dragon's Affection
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden as a flying mount.
Enhances Grass attacks while mounted.

paldeckEntry: When you hug Quivern Botan, if it smells like sunshine and meadows, tomorrow will be sunny. If it smells damp, tomorrow will be wet and miserable.

name: Ragnahawk

partnerSkill.name: Flame Wing
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Applies Fire damage to the player's attacks while mounted.

paldeckEntry: Some think it is a related species to Beakon, but there is in fact no connection. It mainly eats rocks, and after many long years its beak and head have hardened to accommodate this diet.

name: Rayhound

partnerSkill.name: Jumping Force
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted.

paldeckEntry: At full speed, it could be mistaken for a bolt of lightning. If two Rayhounds collide, the sound is like that of a powerful thunderclap.

name: Reindrix

partnerSkill.name: Cool Body
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden.
Keeps the rider cool in hot environments.

paldeckEntry: Its transparent cerulean antlers glow with the cold of absolute zero. Any who touch them with their bare hands are instantly frozen over and smashed into pieces.

name: Relaxaurus

partnerSkill.name: Hungry Missile
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted.

paldeckEntry:
Contrary to its blasé appearance, it's quite ferocious.
It perceives everything in its sight as prey and will stop at nothing to devour it.

name: Relaxaurus Lux

partnerSkill.name: Missile Party
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted.

paldeckEntry: One day, Relaxaurus had an idea. Maybe it was about time for a change. Just then, an electric shock raced through its body!

name: Reptyro

partnerSkill.name: Ore-loving Beast
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Improves efficiency of mining ores while mounted.

paldeckEntry: Magma-like blood runs throughout its body. If a large amount of water is thrown on it, this water rapidly heats, causing an immense vapor explosion.

name: Reptyro Cryst

partnerSkill.name: Ice-loving Beast
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Improves efficiency of mining ores while mounted.

paldeckEntry: Ice cold blood runs throughout its body. If heated rapidly, its blood evaporates, causing an immense vapor explosion.

name: Ribbuny

partnerSkill.name: Skilled Fingers
partnerSkill.description:
While in team, increases attack power of Neutral Pals.
While at base, increases work efficiency if working at Weapon Workbench.

paldeckEntry: A Pal who's never without a bright smile. Occasionally, it gets its tentacles tied up in knots by Cattiva's pranks. During those moments, its expression changes into something altogether demonic.

name: Ribbuny Botan

partnerSkill.name: Grass Weaver
partnerSkill.description:
While in team, increases attack power of Grass Pals.
While at a base, increases the work efficiency if working at .

paldeckEntry:
Always wears a cheerful smile.
Sometimes, thanks to Cattiva's pranks, they end up tangled in tentacles and have to fight their way out!
Even in tough situations, they keep smiling cheerfully.

name: Robinquill

partnerSkill.name: Hawk Eye
partnerSkill.description: While fighting together, allows you to deal more damage to weak points.

paldeckEntry: A pal that is very similar to humans who hunt and live in the forests. It may prove to be a key for understanding what Pals are and how they diverged from humans so long ago.

name: Robinquill Terra

partnerSkill.name: Hawk Eye
partnerSkill.description: While fighting together, allows you to deal more damage to weak points.

paldeckEntry: A Pal that lives a hunting life in rocky areas and is very close to humans. When bones are found in ruins, there are always human bones found nearby as well.

name: Rooby

partnerSkill.name: Tiny Spark
partnerSkill.description: While in team, increases attack power of Fire Pals.

paldeckEntry: Wild Rooby surprisingly never get sick. Eating one piece of charcoal a day, made by burning a branch, is the secret to its eternal health.

name: Rushoar

partnerSkill.name: Hard Head
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Increases efficiency of destroying boulders while mounted.

paldeckEntry: Being extremely aggressive Pal, it often picks fights before gauging its opponent's strength. Though small, its powerful charge can even send boulders flying.

name: Selyne

partnerSkill.name: Celestial Darkness
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden as a flying mount.
Enhances Neutral and Dark attacks while mounted.

paldeckEntry:
The object floating behind, resembling the moon, is said to gradually become more circular with each passing generation.
No one knows what will happen when the moon is full.

name: Shadowbeak

partnerSkill.name: Modified DNA
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Enhances Dark attacks while mounted.

paldeckEntry: Born from the depths of insanity, its very existence should not be. Having lost all genetic ties to other Pals, one wonders if it could still even be considered a Pal.

name: Shroomer

partnerSkill.name: Swooshy Spores
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden.
While at a base, its mysterious spores slow the rate at which the SAN value of allies at the base decreases.

paldeckEntry:
Inhaling large amounts of its spores will put you into a trance.
Sometimes, if Shroomer appears motionless, it's not because it's mimicking a mushroom, but rather because it's high off its own spores.

name: Shroomer Noct

partnerSkill.name: Swooshy Spores
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden.
While at a base, its mysterious spores slow the rate at which the SAN value of allies at the base decreases.

paldeckEntry:
The abundance of spores released by this Pal blocks out sunlight.
Sometimes, if Shroomer Noct appears motionless, it's not because it's mimicking a mushroom, but rather because its own spores don't let it see anything.

name: Sibelyx

partnerSkill.name: Silk Maker
partnerSkill.description: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Blizzard Spike. Sometimes produces High Quality Cloth when assigned to Ranch.

paldeckEntry: A Pal that likes the rain,and will often bask in rain showers until the weather clears up. On rainy days, Foxparks can often be found taking shelter beneath it.

name: Silvegis

partnerSkill.name: Aegis Shield
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden.
Increases the duration of the shield when using Aegis Charge while mounted.

paldeckEntry:
The metallic components around its neck possess magnetic properties.
If the leg pieces get too close, they cling to it.
When metal debris builds up on its neck, it grudgingly begins cleaning, and grows frustrated when it won't come off easily.

name: Smokie

partnerSkill.name: Dig, Dog! Dig!
partnerSkill.description:
When activated, uses its sharp sense of smell to detect nearby Chromite.
While fighting together, a large amount of Chromite is obtained.

paldeckEntry:
The black flames are only warm to the touch, but anything that remains in contact with them slowly melts from the inside.
Hold some cheese above them, and it becomes a true delicacy.

name: Sootseer

partnerSkill.name: Grave Robber
partnerSkill.description: Sometimes digs up Bone when assigned to Ranch.

paldeckEntry:
It was once believed that as the world approached its end, the flame would weaken.
Doomsayers would repeatedly rejoice when the flame began to weaken, but in the end, it turned out to be a prank by Sootseer.
At least, for now.

name: Sparkit

partnerSkill.name: Static Electricity
partnerSkill.description: While in team, increases attack power of Electric Pals.

paldeckEntry: During the dry season, this Pal is always on the verge of blowing a fuse, Sparks can fly with even the slightest provocation even amongst allies.

name: Splatterina

partnerSkill.name: Blade of Uncontrolled Passion
partnerSkill.description: While in possession, the amount of items obtained from using the increases.

paldeckEntry:
It has an uncontrollable urge to tear its prey apart.
Each individual has their own meticulous order for dismemberment.
If caught by Splatterina, pray that your head is taken first.

name: Starryon

partnerSkill.name: Night Dancer
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden.
Increases movement speed while mounted at night.

paldeckEntry:
It takes great pride in its flowing, gorgeous mane.
If it finds a split end, it becomes so mortified it can't focus on running properly.
Because static electricity makes its hair frizzy, it avoids Azurmane at all costs.

name: Surfent

partnerSkill.name: Swift Swimmer
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden to travel on water.
While mounted, prevents stamina depletion while moving over water.

paldeckEntry:
Its hydrodynamic form is well suited to life in water.
Poachers often catch them and use them in place of surfboards.

name: Surfent Terra

partnerSkill.name: Sand Swimmer
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in team, Surfent Terra helps carry supplies, decreasing the weight of ores in the player's inventory.

paldeckEntry: Its aerodynamic form is well suited to life on the sand. Poachers often catch them and use them in place of surfboards

name: Suzaku

partnerSkill.name: Wings of Flame
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Enhances Fire attacks while mounted.

paldeckEntry: It was once believed to usher in the dry season. Whenever there was a drought in the previous year, people would relentlessly seek to cull it's numbers, hoping to bring a plentiful harvest in the next year.

name: Suzaku Aqua

partnerSkill.name: Wings of Water
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Enhances Water attacks while mounted.

paldeckEntry: It was once believed to usher in the rainy season. If there was a flood the previous year, people would relentlessly seek to cull its numbers, hoping to avert disaster in the coming year.

name: Swee

partnerSkill.name: Fluffy
partnerSkill.description: While in team, Sweepa's stats will be increased.

paldeckEntry:
Crawling along the ground, it eats microscopic organic matter.
After a while, it discharges any substances that provide no nutrition.
By using it as a mop for cleaning, everyone wins!

name: Sweepa

partnerSkill.name: King of Fluff
partnerSkill.description: While fighting together, stats will increase the more Swee are in your team.

paldeckEntry:
While hibernating, a large number of Swee hide within its voluminous body hair.
The most ever recorded is 101.

name: Tanzee

partnerSkill.name: Cheery Rifle
partnerSkill.description: When activated, Tanzee will mercilessly fire an assault rifle at nearby enemies.

paldeckEntry: Long ago, this Pal used long objects like tree branches as weapons. After coming into contact with humans, however, it found something much more effective: guns.

name: Tarantriss

partnerSkill.name: Tarantriss's Web
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden.
While mounted, shoots spider silk to grapple and enable rapid movement.

paldeckEntry:
Extremely sticky and clingy.
The more it's resisted, the more tenacious it becomes.
Such is its "personality."

name: Teafant

partnerSkill.name: Soothing Shower
partnerSkill.description: When activated, spouts mysterious water that soothes wounds and restores the player's HP.

paldeckEntry: Large amounts of water pour from what is thought to be its nose, though some say that it is, in fact, just snot. This has sparked a fierce debate among Pal scholars.

name: Tocotoco

partnerSkill.name: Eggbomb Launcher
partnerSkill.description: When activated, equips to the player and transforms into an egg launcher.

paldeckEntry: A frightening Pal that produces exploding eggs. It often fires these eggs from its rear end as a weapon, but when spent the Pal itself explodes.

name: Tombat

partnerSkill.name: Ultrasonic Sensor
partnerSkill.description: When activated, uses ultrasonic waves to detect the location of nearby Pals.

paldeckEntry:
Often appears out of the blue to flaunt its prized wings in front of other Pals.
Although it seems to be an intimidation tactic, the Pal seems to derive some kind of pleasure from the display.

name: Turtacle

partnerSkill.name: Spikey Carrier
partnerSkill.description: While in team, Turtacle helps carry supplies, decreasing the weight of armor in the player's inventory.

paldeckEntry:
To protect its fragile body, it developed an incredible tough shell. Unfortunately, it's utterly defenseless underneath.
Even a tickle could knock it out cold.

name: Turtacle Terra

partnerSkill.name: Shiny Hauler
partnerSkill.description:
While in team, Turtacle Terra helps carry supplies, decreasing the weight of armor in the player's inventory.
Also increases attack power of Ground Pals.

paldeckEntry:
To protect its fragile body, it developed an incredible tough shell.
With most of its senses concentrated in its limbs and shell, it can't even tell if someone quietly touches its core.

name: Univolt

partnerSkill.name: Swift Deity
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. Applies Electric damage to the player's attacks while mounted.

paldeckEntry:
It used to be considered an emissary of the Thunder God, and thus was not hunted by people.
However, after witnesses observed one die from a lightning strike, its reverence faded, and it quite literally fell into the role of a workhorse.

name: Vaelet

partnerSkill.name: Purification of Gaia
partnerSkill.description: While fighting together, Ground Pals drop more items when defeated.

paldeckEntry:
The castle was filled with the king's favorite flowers. A great battle ensued, and flames approached the castle. Amidst the chaos, the spirit of a flower appeared.
- From the fairy tale, The King's Flower.

name: Vanwyrm

partnerSkill.name: Aerial Marauder
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Increases damage player deals to enemy weak points while mounted.

paldeckEntry:
The melodies of a flute made from the exoskeleton of a Vanwyrm are said to cross the whole mountain ranges.
In ages past, such flutes were used to signal an attack.

name: Vanwyrm Cryst

partnerSkill.name: Aerial Marauder
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Increases damage player deals to enemy weak points while mounted.

paldeckEntry: The Melodies of a flute made from the exoskeleton of a Vanwyrm Cryst are said to cross whole mountain ranges. In ages past, such flutes were used to signal victory in a battle.

name: Verdash

partnerSkill.name: Grassland Speedster
partnerSkill.description: When fighting together, increases player's movement speed and applies Grass damage to the player's attacks.

paldeckEntry: Land that Verdash has run across becomes extremely fertile, with thick vegetation growing there soon after. It will not run anywhere that herbicide has been used.

name: Vixy

partnerSkill.name: Dig Here!
partnerSkill.description: Sometimes digs up items from the ground when assigned to Ranch.

paldeckEntry: The idol of Palpagos Island. If you bully a Vixy, you best be prepared to become enemies with the whole world.

name: Warsect

partnerSkill.name: Hard Armor
partnerSkill.description: When fighting together, increases player's defense and applies Fire damage to the player's attacks.

paldeckEntry:
The ultra-hard armor surrounding its body is extremely strong and heat resistant.
Even a napalm blast would hardly leave a scratch.

name: Warsect Terra

partnerSkill.name: Fortified Shell
partnerSkill.description: When fighting together, increases the player's defense and reduces damage received from Fire.

paldeckEntry: The ultra-hard armor surrounding its body is extremely strong and heat resistant. It doesn't flinch even if a Mammorest steps on it.

name: Whalaska

partnerSkill.name: Chilled Whale Cruiser
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden.
While fighting together, fishing minigames begin with the capture gauge more filled than usual.
Additionally, the capture gauge increases more rapidly while the bars are overlapping.

paldeckEntry:
When it sleeps, Pals often mistake it for a drifting piece of ice and rest on it.
Although, gentle and unwilling to push them away when awake, it feels quietly stressed by the intrusion on its personal space.

name: Whalaska Ignis

partnerSkill.name: Cozy Whale Cruiser
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden.
While fighting together, fishining minigames begin with the capture gauge more filled than usual.
Additionally, the capture gauge increases more rapidly while the bars are overlapping.

paldeckEntry:
Determined to never be mistaken for drift ice again, it turned bright red through sheer will.
Unfortunately, some Pals can't see red.
So despite its efforts, its personal space continues to be invaded.

name: Wixen

partnerSkill.name: Lord Fox
partnerSkill.description: When fighting together, applies Fire damage to the player's attacks.

paldeckEntry: With the power of light, it produces arcane phenomena. It prefers to eat food well-done and is particularly hostile towards Katress.

name: Wixen Noct

partnerSkill.name: Lord Black Fox
partnerSkill.description: When fighting together, applies Dark damage to the player's attacks.

paldeckEntry:
Due to its upbringing, it no longer cares about whether its food is cooked enough.
This Pal stopped worrying about those details, and just prefers its food to be as sweet as possible.
Not on good terms with Katress Ignis.

name: Woolipop

partnerSkill.name: Candy Pop
partnerSkill.description: Sometimes drops Cotton Candy when assigned to ranch.

paldeckEntry:
Its entire body is 18,000 times sweeter than sugar.
Carnivorous Pals lured by its scent will find themselves overwhelmed by sweetness and even pass out should they take a bite of this Pal.

name: Wumpo

partnerSkill.name: Guardian of the Snowy Mountain
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in team, Wumpo helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

paldeckEntry: Researchers once tried to shave off its hair to reveal its true form. In the end, only hair was left, as if that was all there was to begin with.

name: Wumpo Botan

partnerSkill.name: Guardian of the Grassy Fields
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden. While in team, Wumpo Botan helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

paldeckEntry: Researchers once tried to cut the grass off its body to reveal its true form. In the end, only grass was left, as if that was all there was to begin with.

name: Xenogard

partnerSkill.name: Crater Enthusiast
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden.
While in the team, it's easier to obtain Meteorite Fragment and Pure Quartz.

paldeckEntry:
Consumes information and turns it into energy.
Regularly seems to be sending information to someone.
-Hello? What was the message you just sent? I devoured it before checking.

name: Xenolord

partnerSkill.name: Meteor Wings
partnerSkill.description:
Can be ridden as a flying mount.
Greatly increases movement speed while flying.

paldeckEntry:
-Destination reached. Priority: Locate entity "Supersonic Dragon"
-Note: Conquest deadline exceeded by years.
-Update: No conquest traces found. Naturalization confirmed. Commence elimination protocol.
-Staff Memo: Refrain from forgetting or consuming critical data!

name: Xenovader

partnerSkill.name: Meteorite Mania
partnerSkill.description: While in team, increases damage dealt to ores, and it's easier to obtain Meteorite Fragment.

paldeckEntry:
Can send information and convert it into energy by forgetting it.
Regularly seems to be sending information to someone.
- Respond. Target located. Proceed to immediate destruction.
